creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
> //usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8: undefined reference to `BIO_dgram_sctp_wait_for_dry'
> //usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8: undefined reference to `BIO_dgram_sctp_msg_waiting'
> //usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8: undefined reference to `BIO_dgram_is_sctp'
It looks like a problem with your security/openssl port. Have you updated it recently? Does it help if you rebuild it?
